title: Unidentified Human Jedi (Jedi Temple)

{{Quote|Let us find justice—for our brother and sister Jedi!|"Justice" Jedi|<ref name="ITU" />}}
This individual was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A survivor of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the execution of [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], this individual attempted to convince the citizens of the [[Temple district/Legends|Temple Precinct]] that the Jedi were not traitors when he stormed the steps of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. His attempt was in vain, as he was overwhelmed by the troopers guarding the Temple's entrance. The Jedi wielded a [[Color/Legends|blue]]-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="ITU" />

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], this Jedi was [[Jedi training/Legends|tutored]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. After constructing a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and completing the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], this man ascended to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], this Jedi dutifully took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and led [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in battle for three years.<ref name="ITU" />

[[File:JusticeJediDeath.png|thumb|left|250px|The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] is shot and killed.]]
When [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] betrayed the Order by issuing [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the Grand Army, effectively disbanding the Jedi, this individual survived and went into hiding in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant Undercity]]. Within days of the Temple's [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|occupation]] by the newly formed [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], this Jedi spoke to a crowd of citizens on the steps of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|public entrance to the Temple]]. Amidst the smoke from a blazing pyre, the Jedi called upon his fellow Jedi in the crowd to avenge their betrayed brother and sister Jedi and reclaim the Temple. When no other being joined him, he raced up the stairs, lightsaber ablaze and killing one stormtrooper, only to be shot down by members of the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] still guarding the Temple. His body was quickly tossed onto the makeshift pyre on the steps for all to see.<ref name="ITU" />
